about: Seed evaluation corpus for Brain hybrid retrieval (Layer 1). Real questions JD would ask his brain, each with the note path(s) that SHOULD be retrieved. Expand this to 100-200 cases before removing the old lexical-only path (see spec: Evaluation corpus and quality gates). recall@k = fraction of cases where at least one expected path appears in the top-k hits. Deliberately includes semantic-mismatch cases (question wording differs from the note).
